mapper.select: SELECT gd.id, gd.group_id, gd.equipment_id, gd.remark, gd.is_deleted, gd.create_time, gd.create_username, gd.update_time, gd.update_username, e.equipment_code AS equipment_code, e.equipment_name AS equipment_name, e.status AS equipment_status FROM sp_equipment_group_device gd LEFT JOIN sp_equipment e ON gd.equipment_id = e.id WHERE gd.is_deleted = '0' AND gd.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY gd.create_time

SELECT e.id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, e.status AS status, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pr.route_code) AS processNames FROM sp_equipment e LEFT JOIN sp_process_equipment_rel rel ON rel.equipment_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sp_process_route pr ON pr.id = rel.route_id AND pr.is_deleted = '0' WHERE e.is_deleted = '0'
AND e.equipment_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{codeLike}, '%')
AND e.equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nameLike}, '%')
GROUP BY e.id, e.equipment_code, e.equipment_name, e.status ORDER BY e.equipment_code
